title: apium crinitum
intro: Apium crinitum, also known as long-fruited celery or Queen celery, is a perennial plant in the carrot family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Apium crinitum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat a range of health issues, from gastrointestinal problems to skin conditions.
